question: Is the image a horizontal, flat design (no 3D/perspective) dashboard with a light gray background and white card sections?
Does the top row contain exactly 4 KPI cards featuring large numbers, small descriptions, and period-over-period arrow icons?
Do the KPI cards display the exact values: 'USD 1.991M', '5,620', '3.48%', and '74k'?
Does the main left chart (Dual Y-axis) feature a left axis (Revenue) range of 100–240 and a right axis (MAU) range of 40–80?
In the Dual Y-axis chart, is the Revenue line cyan-blue with circular markers and the MAU line purple with square markers?
Is the text annotation 'Dec peak' present near the December data point in the Dual Y-axis chart?
Does the top-right 'Churn Rate' line chart use an orange-red line and display data labels '4.2' (Jan) and '2.9' (Dec)?
Does the middle-right Stacked Bar chart contain exactly 4 bars (Q1–Q4) with totals '1020', '1290', '1500', and '1810' displayed at the top?
Does the bottom-right Donut chart contain exactly 4 segments with leader lines connecting to external labels?
Do the Donut chart labels correctly display the percentages and values: 55% (121), 25% (55), 12% (26), and 8% (18)?
Does the bottom Data Table have exactly 5 columns with bold headers: MONTH, REVENUE_k, MAU_k, CHURN_%, NEW_CUSTOMERS?
Does the first row (Jan) of the Data Table match the values: 120, 48, 4.2, 320?
Does the last row (Dec) of the Data Table match the values: 220, 74, 2.9, 650?
Are there any obvious artifacts, nonsense visual noise, or perspective distortions?
